textByHash.134018013eb41a409f12fbd1df163028474a2a28: Shhh! I'm waiting for the show!
textByHash.6c29a3197e96a89c75e7ac6f484ad7844cdc09e3: Don't give up your day job outerlander!
textByHash.e295bdda427df14299d00e5ecd1e0942734f79d3: I thought somebody was murdering a cat!
textByHash.cdc1dc89c189ef58621021692505c08323d77985: You know, I actually quite liked that verse...
textByHash.25300ce88f08e64a3fa47b5b8eba45013ecbc6da: That's kind of catchy. Irritating. But catchy.
textByHash.67d8199f192f8b8535b18d269d05944a9b680be9: Hey, I've done that quest too!
textByHash.ec5ac6683872585116effe21af8885209bfbf074: I have produced better sounds in the outhouse!
textByHash.32f0c6e3cad3cdfac36961c8cea14a20797f6088: Your song makes no sense outerlander!
textByHash.b2c1ff695b5f38d87e3858ec48b7ff03f735307e: What kind of bard are you anyway?
textByHash.1a0ab0b0b05cd4c5bbf2d87b5fbb4b1453580aa7: I have met cows more musical than you!
textByHash.1b7142ac020026218839fdea88f56e3ab442144e: When do you get to the good parts?
textByHash.33f16595b5637cadc5ed356f007e7b83f6db9a43: Truly, this is the worst sound I have ever heard!
textByHash.0225105418c43f1c78784f79f2c1350a6b60cf8d: Please tell me that was the last verse...
textByHash.551714edd1dbe8b93c4252563f96472fdcf42f40: Never before have mine ears been so offended!
textByHash.d6f7a8cfca71e737d0c9f98883505884104822cf: Please, ye gods! Make it stop!
textByHash.f2e769b41ecfad73dd694e69d5ed1620627ea8a9: The screams of my dying comrades sound better!
textByHash.4e84ea1736a2552df7e562e406962526f8f83338: My grandmother could do better, and she is dead!
textByHash.8af34843e392d9431e795ae4342172e281a38ae5: I do such feats before breakfast!
textByHash.5845a87681ac569fd6688c27a36457b04337984c: Is your singing some kind of outerlander weapon?
